title: TAB Session Telemetry
description: Cost and time tracking per session. Finalized in Block 2.

mcp_failures.description: Structured record of tool-call failures captured by the PostToolUseFailure hook (scripts/on-tool-failure.sh). Feeds reliability metrics and drives degraded-mode fallback decisions.

execution_path.description: Cross-examination backend resolved by the SKILL.md Phase 5 three-gate logic. 'agent_teams' = real Agent Teams (Claude Code v2.1.32+, env on, knob ∈ {agent_teams, auto}). 'subagents_fallback' = knob=auto but env off; degraded silently. 'subagents' = default fan-out path. See skills/tab/references/agent-teams-mode.md.

teammate_idles.description: Teammate-stall events captured by the TeammateIdle hook (scripts/on-teammate-idle.sh). Only populated when execution_path=agent_teams.
